case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. GREGORY MAYZEL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-27-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT MAYZEL, GREGORY DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-2010
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
